sources.title: Building a hill-climbing machine: Launching seven new MAI models
sources.note: Microsoft announced seven in-house MAI models; flagship MAI-Thinking-1 preferred to Claude Sonnet 4.6 in blind human side-by-side evals

sources.title: AI Updates Today (June 2026) — Latest AI Model Releases
